channel.title: OpenAI-Selection
channel.description: OpenAI News から選別された記事フィード

item.title: エフィンガム郡コミュニティとAIインフラを構築(Building AI infrastructure with the Effingham County community)
item.description: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia, with commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex.

item.title: 国家科学の次なる時代を推進する(Advancing the next era of national science)
item.description: OpenAI outlines its commitment to advancing American science working with the U.S. Department of Energy and national labs to use frontier AI to accelerate discovery.

item.title: OpenAI Presenceの紹介(Introducing OpenAI Presence)
item.description: Introducing OpenAI Presence, a proven enterprise AI agent platform that helps organizations deploy trusted voice and chat agents for customer and internal workflows.
